title: Spayzers' Story Mode Additions
description: Add a bunch of stuff from Minecraft Story Mode, with some modifications
body:
# Spayzers' Story Mode Additions
### ****GECKOLIB AND CURIOS IS REQUIRED FOR THE MOD TO WORK****

Looking for a mod that adds more adventure? More treasures? Or dangerous foes coming straight out of Minecraft Story Mode? If so, this is the mod for you!

SSMA, an abbreviation for Spayzers' Story Mode Additions, is a mod that takes EVERYTHING from the Minecraft : Story Mode game series, and add it to Minecraft.

It aims to be an adventure, combat and exploration mod. Discover the secrets of the Doom Sea, or try to fight the mysterious White Pumpkin, or if you're courageous enough, venture below the bedrock for an unknown and dangerous journey. (The Underneath ain't out yet)

But this mod isn't like the others. Why you ask me? Because it also focuses on adding unique elements that, even though weren't in the main game, could feel canon in a way, while being explained and logical.

So, get ready for a big journey, as nothing built can last forever.

This mod is still in alpha, and many elements such as weapons, armor, dimension, structures and bosses are still under development.

But fear not! Updates will be forthcoming, adding everything promised.

<details>
<summary>Update Roadmap</summary>

Blazed Sky Update : Sky dimension, sky city and blaze rods guild, Aiden as boss, special blaze rod sword : UNFINISHED

A Mystery Update : mansion, white pumpkin boss, special white pumpkin axe item : WORKING ON

Depth of the Colossus Update : Sea Temple, Prismarine Colossus boss, structures blocks : UNFINISHED

The Useful Update : P.A.M.A boss, Crowd Mesa, Redstone heart (Due to the way the boss works, this will take longer than most updates) : UNFINISHED

Sea Temple, Prismarine Colossus boss, structures blocks : UNFINISHED

Snowy Consequence Update : Icy Palace of Despair, tower with 3 boss : UNFINISHED

The Underneath Update : dimension, sunshine institute structure, giant obsidian maze, Fred keep, the Oasis, Romeoburg, three headed ghast boss, giant enderman boss, giant magma golem boss, ninja ivor miniboss : UNFINISHED (These will be split into multiple updates)

Terminal Update : Twisted beacon town, the Terminal, The Admin/Romeo as final boss : UNFINISHED (Will be the final major update)
</details>

---

# FAQ

### Will Fabric Support be made?
Likely not. With how MCreator works, adding Fabric support (or any other loader support) will require remaking the entire mod again. There might be a simpler way to do it, but we can't figure out how. Plus, it'll just take way longer to update it on both ends.

### Is this compatible with other mods?
Depends on the mods, and likely yes. Some might not be compatible, but if they are, just remove them accordingly.

### Can I use this in my modpack?
Yes, but be sure to put credits or die
  
  -Spayzers

### Do I install this on the Client, or the Server?
In most cases, if you're doing singleplayer, just click the "Install" button and it'll be handled by Modrinth. If you want to make a server with this, download the latest version and put it in the "mods" folder of your server files. Players have to have it installed Client-side to be able to join, so tell them that and give the mod link.


### I found a bug! How do I report it?
Modrinth doesn't have bug reporting / comments on mods yet, so until then, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/ytC3nCmzhe) server and make a post in the bug reporting channel.

---

Want to get exclusive news to SSMA? Or even snapshots? Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/ytC3nCmzhe)! :D
